C:\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\monefy_server.dir/objects.a
C:\w64devkit\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\monefy_server.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\monefy_server.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\w64devkit\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\monefy_server.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o monefy_server.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmonefy_server.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\monefy_server.dir\linkLibs.rsp
